cases.user_prompt: make this better and more clear for the team

runs.raw_output:
Make the following document clearer and more concise for the team:  
(context) Provide a clear and concise document to ensure all team members understand their roles and responsibilities.  
(constraints) The output should be in Markdown format, no longer than 100 words per section, and maintain a professional tone.  
(output_format) 
| Section | Content |
|---------|-----------|
| Introduction | Brief overview of the project or document purpose. |
| Roles & Responsibilities | Clear list of each team member's responsibilities with brief descriptions. |
| Timeline | Overview of key milestones and deadlines in a timeline format. |
| Conclusion | Final thoughts or next steps for the team to consider.
runs.visible_output:
